title: The Barbarian
writer: Theodore Seixas Solomons, E.P. Heath, Milton Markwell
actors: Monroe Salisbury, George Berrell, J. Barney Sherry
plot: Elliot Straive is a college professor who has left the evils of civilization behind to raise his son Eric in the purity of the Canadian wilderness. James Heatherton sends Mark Grant to get the mining rights to Straive's land as va...
